"'''Rust Never Sleeps'''" is a comic first published in [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 156|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 156]], written by [[Alan Moore]]. It was later reprinted and colorized in [[Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds 2|''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'' 2]].

==Plot summary==
C-3PO and R2-D2 pose as inert droids and are taken by a junk hauler to Ronyards where countless broken or malfunctioning droids die. They encounter [[Fivelines]], a droid with many disciples that believe Ronyards to be a god. Threepio warns Fivelines that the Empire is planning to strip Ronyards of its metal and use it for their own purposes. Fivelines unfortunately does not listen and is destroyed when an Imperial Star Destroyer arrives.
The droids' "God" then destroy the scout group of stormtroopers and eventually the Star Destroyer itself. Imperial records simply state that there was an accident that caused the Star Destroyer to crash on Ronyards and that all onboard the ship were killed.
